title: Inception
description: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is tasked with planting an idea.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
description: Two imprisoned men bond over years, finding solace and redemption through acts of common decency.

title: Interstellar
description: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Batman faces the Joker who wants to plunge Gotham into anarchy.
